hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.sh) bash -n "$f" || exit 2; command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && shellcheck -S warning -x "$f" || true ;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in "$HOME/.claude/"*) echo "Refuse: '$f' is a rendered user-global Claude config. Edit the source template under claude/*.tmpl in this repo instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; done
